title: Layout with Flexbox
objectives: Use display: flex to create flexible, responsive layouts
Control alignment and spacing with justify-content and align-items
Build a card-based layout that adapts to different screen widths
hints: display: flex on a container makes its children flex items — they'll line up in a row by default
flex-wrap: wrap lets items flow to the next line instead of shrinking to fit
justify-content controls horizontal spacing, align-items controls vertical alignment
assessmentCriteria: At least one container uses display: flex
Layout uses flex-wrap for responsive behavior
justify-content and align-items are used for alignment
A card or grid-like pattern is created with consistent spacing
